name: set_active_schedule_timetable
description: Sets/activates a specific heating schedule timetable for a zone. Allows users to switch between different available schedules (e.g., ONE_DAY, THREE_DAY, SEVEN_DAY) to apply a new schedule template to the zone. This enables users to change which schedule pattern controls the zone's heating.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home/installation

timetable_id.description: The ID of the schedule timetable to activate (e.g., 1 for THREE_DAY, 2 for SEVEN_DAY)

zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the heating zone/room
